speaker: speaker1
text: Can you help me plan the office party ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure . What do you need the most help with , the food or entertainment ?

speaker: speaker2
text: OK , well , let's coordinate our efforts . Should this party be formal or casual ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I think it should be casual .

speaker: speaker2
text: I agree . Next , we have to decide on food . We have a choice of Chinese or Continental Cuisine . Which one should we have ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I would prefer Chinese food for this party .

speaker: speaker2
text: Perfect choice . For music , should we have a live band or a DJ ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I think we should hire a live band .

speaker: speaker2
text: OK then . Well , I will work on my part and get back to you with my progress on Friday .
